basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA )
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA ) Tuition Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of SVPNPA . Has been announced through the SVPNPA Tuition Teacher Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: Not specified Age Relaxation: Not specified

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in Bachelor of Science (PCM/PCB) B.Ed/ M.Sc
qualification.details: Tuition Teacher (Science): Graduation in Bachelor of Science (PCM/PCB) with at least 50 percent marks in the desired subject in Graduation and Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) with at least 55 percent marks in the degree. Desirable: Master's degree i.e. M.Sc with 55 percent marks. Minimum 02 years of teaching experience in school/Tuition Centre/Some Private Organisation. Fair command on Hindi, Telugu and English.
